---
title: "John Athelstan Laurie Riley"
---

## John Athelstan Laurie Riley

**Dates:** (1858-1945)

### Description

vice-president of the Church Union

### Biography

He was Chairman of the Anglican and Eastern Church Association, and Seigneur de la Trinité, Jersey. He married (1887) the Hon. Andalusia Molesworth.   [LG 1952, WWW]

### Letters

- Letter from April 21st [1893]
- Letter from Feb 23rd 1893

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
